features.summary: Meta reported strong Q4 2024 results with $48.4B revenue (up 21% YoY) and $20.8B net income. Daily active users across Meta's apps reached 3.3 billion people. Meta AI now has over 700 million monthly active users and is positioned to reach 1 billion users in 2025. The company expects significant AI infrastructure investments with $60-65B CapEx planned for 2025, including deployment of nearly 1 gigawatt of capacity. Revenue growth was driven by online commerce vertical and improved ad performance through new ML systems like Andromeda.
features.management_outlook: Management expects 2025 to be a pivotal year with multiple long-term initiatives reaching clarity. They anticipate Q1 2025 revenue of $39.5-41.8B (8-15% growth) and full-year expenses of $114-119B. Llama 4 is progressing well in training with plans for multimodal and agentic capabilities. The company expects continued strong revenue growth throughout 2025 driven by core business investments. Ray-Ban Meta glasses momentum will determine if AI glasses become the next major computing platform, with this year being defining for the category's trajectory.
features.risks: The company faces active regulatory headwinds in both EU and US that could significantly impact business and financial results. Foreign currency is expected to be a 3% headwind to revenue growth. Supply availability constraints could affect CapEx execution plans. The massive AI infrastructure investments ($60-65B CapEx) represent substantial capital intensity with uncertain long-term returns. Competition in AI space is intensifying, particularly with new entrants like DeepSeek demonstrating novel approaches that could impact Meta's investment trajectory.
features.key_drivers: AI infrastructure investments are the primary expense growth driver, followed by technical talent hiring in priority areas. Meta AI's rapid adoption (700M+ MAUs) positions it as the leading AI assistant globally. Advantage+ shopping campaigns reached $20B annual run rate with 70% YoY growth. Video engagement showed double-digit growth on both Instagram globally and Facebook in the US. Threads reached 320M monthly actives with over 1M daily signups. The new Andromeda ML system delivered 8% improvement in ad quality and 10,000x increase in model complexity for ad retrieval.
